goal: decide product scope, first-niche choice, and launch shape for writer-tool — then hand off to project-launcher
resolution: Writer-tool implemented as SIE-X adapter (adapters/writer.py) with 3 genre-specific prompt templates. Not a separate SaaS — an adapter-pair per the platform pattern. Options matrix Option B (Bacowr generation engine) was the closest match but evolved to 'SIE-X adapter' after the platform rescue revealed SIE-X as the real foundation.
